verbatim_text: This is fed back into the AI system once again causing the state to update to one where Jack now possesses the book but not Janet. So consequently a coherent next output would be Jack lost the book and not Janet lost the book. For user models an example is a user dialogue. So for example the user first says give me an article about sports. Now the system infers that the user prefers to read an article about sports. So a coherent recommendation in this case is Team USA women's hockey enters knockout round. Now suppose the user says make about basketball. Then we can further narrow the user's preference to only basketball. So now NBA finds Utah Jazz is a coherent generation but not relive choice half-pipe run.
